infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Smart EMS needs your location to accurately report emergencies and route help to you.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Smart EMS needs your location to accurately report emergencies and route help to you.

plugins.cameraPermission: Smart EMS needs camera access so you can attach photos or video to an emergency report.
plugins.microphonePermission: Smart EMS needs microphone access so you can attach an audio statement to an emergency report.

plugins.cameraPermission: Smart EMS needs camera access so you can attach photos or video to an emergency report.
plugins.microphonePermission: Smart EMS needs microphone access to include audio when you attach a video.
